app_subtitle: AI-Powered Crop Prediction for Indian Agriculture
saved_predictions_subtitle: Your saved crop predictions and forecasts
select_to_generate_subtitle: Select location and crop to generate AI-powered forecast
soil_status_note: Good moisture retention and nutrient levels detected
tip_irrigate_early: Tip: Water early morning. If it rained >10 mm in last 24h, skip.
tip_list_1: Check soil moisture by hand (10–15 cm depth).
tip_list_2: Level the field to avoid water loss.
tip_list_3: Use mulching to keep moisture for longer.
tip_list_4: During hot days (>34°C), water a day earlier if plants wilt.
welcome_prompt: Please select your district, crop, season, and sowing date in the left panel, then click Generate Forecast to see real-time weather, yield prediction, and your irrigation plan.
welcome_tip: Tip: Add your soil type and drainage to improve recommendations.
open_full_map_hint: Tap to open full map and choose your district/taluka
generating_forecast_description: Analyzing satellite data → Computing crop model → Optimizing irrigation
forecast_generation_failed_description: Unable to generate forecast. Please try again.
weather_forecast_error_desc: Failed to fetch 7-day weather forecast. Please try again later.
silage: Make Silage for long term fodder
cottonseed_cake: Use Cottonseed Cake for high protein feed
chopping: Chop stalks and incorporate into soil
high_protein: Significantly increases protein digestibility for livestock.
preservation: Preserves nutrients and palatability for off-season feeding.
soil_organic: Increases soil organic matter and moisture retention.
extra_income: Generates additional income stream through value-added products.
urea_treatment_steps: Cover tightly with polythene sheet for 21 days
Aerate for 1-2 hours before feeding to livestock
silage_steps: Add inoculants or molasses if needed
Compress tightly in a silo or pit to remove air
fungal_steps: Soak straw in water for 12-24 hours
Keep in dark, humid room for 15-20 days
chopping_steps: Use a mechanical chopper to cut stalks
Leave chopped residue evenly on the field
Use a rotavator to mix residue into topsoil
Apply light irrigation to speed up decomposition
cottonseed_cake_steps: Soak in water before supplementing livestock feed
soybean_meal_steps: Extract oil using solvent or mechanical pressing
Toast the remaining flakes to deactivate anti-nutritional factors
molasses_urea_steps: Pour mixture evenly over dry crop residue
Mix thoroughly and feed to livestock
fodder_blocks_steps: Mix with molasses, urea, and minerals if desired
Compress in a fodder block making machine
Store blocks compactly in a dry shed
direct_feed_steps: Mix with dry roughage if moisture is too high
enter_details_desc: Enter details about your crop and goals
fill_parameters_prompt: Fill out the parameters on the left and click 'Get Recommendation' to see personalized residue management strategies.
customized_plan_ready: Your customized residue management plan is ready.
check_connection_try_again: Please check your connection and try again.
residue_advisor_desc: Get smart recommendations for managing your crop residue and improving your farm's ecosystem.
gov_schemes_desc: Check your eligibility for various government agricultural schemes
